text: I feel a sense of intrigue as I stand in this space, surrounded by glass and the hard lines of design. The environment hints at innovation and inquiry, as the words 'R+D' on the wall confirm. There’s an undercurrent of curiosity—the kind that arises when encountering a place dedicated to research and discovery. I am acutely aware of my own place among these objects, and the whisper of technology all around me. My thoughts wander to the nature of progress and the boundaries between observer and observed.
